---
applyTo: "**/*.ts,**/*.tsx,**/*.js,**/*.jsx"
description: "Performance optimization guidelines for Next.js apps."
---

# Performance Optimization

- Use built-in Next.js image and font optimization
- Prefer Server Components for heavy logic
- Use Suspense and loading states for async data
- Avoid large client bundles; keep logic server-side when possible
- Use caching and revalidation intentionally
